creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 196789
py-drf-yasg-1.9.2.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates www/py-drf-yasg to 1.9.2 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/axnsan12/drf-yasg/releases/tag/1.9.2


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4-, 11.1-, 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-ALPHA4 i386 + amd64) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK


Note:
There is already 1.10.0 out but that version is not officially approved for the 2.4.x release of net-mgmt/netbox .
